form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 3rd in a Maiden on April 4 over 400m at this track behind Sergeant Duker beaten 3 lengths (23.31). Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Ran a better race when second behind Reborn Harmony at this track last start over 400m (23.38). Has good early speed and will stick on.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 5.5 lengths behind Tara Rebel over 400m. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 400m at this track. Happy to risk in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room in the front straight and was checked as a consequence.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (23.36) over 388m at Gosford. Drawn awkwardly. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Is a 19 start maiden overdue for a win, hitting the frame last start when third (24.03) over 400m at this track. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Having his first run at this track. Coming off a modest effort last start when he finished last on March 18 over 300m at Taree Super Track behind Try To Relax beaten 14 lengths (18.31) in a Maiden. Jumps from box 8. Will need to improve to feature.
